payload.task_label: Authorized evolution review of implement skill
authorized review of implement skill; disposition closed_no_skill_defect
authorized review of implement skill; candidate_rejected_validation
payload.expected: Per authorized-review step 6, running the isolated candidate copy's own deterministic test suite (node --test on the copied target scripts) would execute directly to give clean before/after signal.
payload.observed: node --test on the candidate copy errored ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on the target's cross-skill relative imports (../../tdd/..., ../../code-review/...), and a separate adapter-layout test failed because it reads .agents/skills/implement relative to the canonical (non-copy) location.
payload.consequence: The deterministic-check step took extra diagnosis and setup before yielding clean signal; one test failure had to be hand-verified as locational against the live canonical path.
payload.workaround_taken: Built sibling-skill symlinks (tdd, code-review) at the candidate's expected relative import path, and cross-ran the adapter test at the live location to confirm the sole remaining failure was environmental.

payload.task_label: skill-evolution run: grilling ten_use_unresolved review, candidate rejected
skill-evolution review of code-review (#149 accepted-residual friction); candidate rejected_validation, live skill unchanged

payload.expected: Step 5 prescribes copying the live target to reviews/<review-id>/candidate/ outside skill discovery and modifying only that copy, and step 6 prescribes running applicable deterministic checks on both versions; the candidate's own test suite was expected to run at that location and be comparable with the live suite.
payload.observed: The implement suite resolves sibling skills relatively (../../code-review, ../../tdd in build-closeout-body.test.mjs:28-29 and ../code-review in validate-closeout-body.test.mjs:19) and the Codex adapter via ../../../../.agents/skills/implement, so the candidate copy under reports/skill-evidence/implement-9c896fc7/reviews/rev_6d779702-5998-4ce9-8c14-9f289044bc11/candidate reported 2 failures and only 55 collected tests against the live suite's 78, for locational reasons rather than behavioral ones.
payload.consequence: One suite run had to be diagnosed as a harness artifact and discarded, and a staging tree had to be built before a like-for-like T5 comparison (current 78/78, candidate 81/81) was possible.
payload.workaround_taken: Staged both versions under a scratch root reproducing .claude/skills/<name> siblings as symlinks plus a real copy of .agents/skills/implement, then ran node --test on each staged version at the canonical relative depth.
